metadata.title: Tutora — Find a trusted tutor in minutes
metadata.description: Tutora connects students and parents with verified tutors by budget, district, subject, rating, format, and language. Transparent pricing, real reviews, and fast matching.
metadata.keywords: tutor, private tutor, find a tutor, online tutoring, tutoring platform, verified tutors, exam prep, repetitor

hero.title: Find the right tutor, fast
hero.subtitle: Search trusted, verified tutors by budget, district, subject, rating, and format — and book with confidence in minutes, not weeks.
hero.trustNote: Verified profiles · Transparent pricing · Real reviews

why.title: Finding a tutor shouldn't be a guessing game
why.description: Social feeds and word-of-mouth leave you comparing strangers with no prices, no proof, and no reviews. Tutora replaces the guesswork with structure.

rows.problem: No way to compare tutors side by side
rows.solution: Filter and compare by price, rating, and format

rows.problem: You can't verify identity or credentials
rows.solution: Every tutor is identity- and certificate-verified
Real, moderated reviews from past students

rows.problem: It takes days or weeks to find someone
rows.solution: The right match in minutes, not weeks

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: How does Tutora verify tutors?
items.answer: Every tutor completes identity verification and submits their certificates, which our team reviews before the profile goes live. Verified tutors carry a badge on their profile.

items.question: Is Tutora free for students?
items.answer: Yes. Searching, comparing, and contacting tutors is free for students and parents. You only pay the tutor for the lessons you agree on.

items.question: How is pricing shown?
items.answer: Every tutor lists transparent rates per subject and format, so you always see the price before you reach out — no hidden costs.

items.question: Can I take lessons online or in person?
items.answer: Both. You can filter tutors by format — online, at your home, or at the tutor's place — and choose what works best for you.

items.question: Which languages does Tutora support?
items.answer: The platform is available in Azerbaijani, English, and Russian, and you can filter tutors by their teaching language.

items.question: How do I become a tutor?
items.answer: Create a profile, add your subjects, experience, and certificates, and complete verification. Once approved, students can find and contact you.
